opinion.h4: IN RE GROSS. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 1035. Decided March 24, 1969.
opinion.p: Roger Arnebergh, Philip E. Grey, and Michael T. Sauer for the State of California.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
opinion.h4: FEDERAL-BRYANT MACH. v. DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE/ILLINOIS, 394 U.S. 321 (1969)
opinion.p: 394 U.S. 321 FEDERAL-BRYANT MACHINERY CO. v. DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE OF ILLINOIS. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 1069. Decided March 24, 1969.
William J. Scott, Attorney General of Illinois, and Francis T. Crowe, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
